title: OP Sign is shutting down, Migrate in minutes to keep your workflows live

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. Nir from GetSign.io Here. Are your quotes and contracting workflows are in a risk of braking due to OP Sign winding down? We are happy to announce that Starting next week GetSign is going to be fully compatible auto sending PDF documents that are stored on file column without any manual work, when you change an item status.

Contact us for help in migrating from OP Sign to GetSign with no risk of loosing a deal and Get a lifetime discount of 15% when you do the switch.
